assignments.name: Assign_Multi_Select_Picklists_to_Text_Variables
assignments.label: Assign Multi-Select Picklists to Text Variables

decisions.name: Closed_Won_Reason_Closed_Won_Reason_2_Validation
decisions.label: Closed Won Reason = Closed Won Reason #2 Validation

rules.name: Closed_Won_Reason_Closed_Won_Reason_2
rules.label: Closed Won Reason = Closed Won Reason #2

rules.name: Competitor_Product_Missing
rules.conditionLogic: (1 AND 4 AND 5 AND 6 AND NOT 8 AND (2 OR 3 OR 7)) OR (8 AND 9 AND 10 AND 11 AND 12 AND (13 OR 14 OR 15))
rules.label: Competitor Product Missing

decisions.description: 23/10/2022 - Changed the logic to Less then or Equal "0". Requested by Lola from Salesops.
decisions.name: Downsell_Opp
decisions.label: Downsell Opp?

decisions.name: Is_there_a_DDQ_that_need_to_be_updated
decisions.label: Is there a DDQ that need to be updated

decisions.name: Issues_With_Data_We_Show_None_Validation
decisions.label: Issues With Data We Show None Validation

rules.name: Issues_With_Data_We_Show_None
rules.label: Issues With Data We Show None

decisions.name: Missing_Data_or_Feature_None_Validation
decisions.label: Missing Data or Feature None Validation

rules.name: Missing_Account_Fields
rules.conditionLogic: 1 OR 2 OR 3 OR 4 OR ((5 OR 6) AND (7 OR 8))
rules.label: Missing Account Fields

rules.name: Other_Competitors_Error
rules.conditionLogic: (1 AND 3 AND NOT 2 AND NOT 4) OR (4 AND 5 AND 6 AND NOT 7)
rules.label: Other Competitors Error

rules.name: Other_Competitors_Missing
rules.conditionLogic: (1 AND NOT 4 AND (2 OR 3)) OR (4 AND 5 AND (6 OR 7))
rules.label: Other Competitors Missing

decisions.name: Partnership_or_Logo_Rights_Opt_Out
decisions.label: Partnership or Logo Rights Opt Out?

decisions.description: If we found related SE/CSA Requests, we should check the Variable that handles the conditional filter in the Scree Flow for "CSA Satisfaction" field.
decisions.name: Related_Requests
decisions.label: Related Requests

rules.name: Found_both_CSA_SE_and_DDQ_reqiests
rules.label: Found both CSA/SE and DDQ requests

decisions.description: MIS-6307 Updates Account New Sales SM, when Opportunity is Closed Won and Owner Role, contains "Sales"
decisions.name: Update_New_Sale_SM
decisions.label: Update New Sale SM

Flow.description: MIS-8118 - Added UpdatedByNextStage to New Sale/Upsell stage update MIS-7326 - Excluded Delta ARR = 1 and -1 from cycle price validation MIS-7609 - remove product sold + product tracking and plan details changes + Validate missing products MIS-7365 - Added Acquired Company MIS-7404 Add fault paths to opportunity flows MIS-7165 + MIS-7375 - Added Upsell Type MIS-7274 - removed logo rights 28APR2025 - Added Product Tracking flow, Added the Proposal skip 29APR2025 - Removed old Product Tracking validation

formulas.name: CompetitorProductResult
formulas.expression: IF( ISBLANK ({!CompetitorProductInput}) || ISNULL({!CompetitorProductInput}) || {!CompetitorProductInput} = "", {!CompetitorProductVar}, IF( {!CompetitorProductInput} = '--None--', null, IF( CONTAINS({!CompetitorProductInput}, '; --None--'), SUBSTITUTE({!CompetitorProductInput}, '; --None--', ""), IF( CONTAINS({!CompetitorProductInput}, '; --None--;'), SUBSTITUTE({!CompetitorProductInput}, '; --None--;', ""), IF( CONTAINS({!CompetitorProductInput}, '--None--;'), SUBSTITUTE({!CompetitorProductInput}, '--None--;', ""), {!CompetitorProductInput} )))))

formulas.name: CyclePriceResult
formulas.expression: IF( ISPICKVAL({!Get_Opportunity.Type}, 'Feature Update'), 0, IF( AND( OR( ISPICKVAL({!Get_Opportunity.Type},'New Sale'), ISPICKVAL({!Get_Opportunity.Type},'Upsell'), ISPICKVAL({!Get_Opportunity.Type},'Renewal') ), {!CurrencyInput} = 'USD' ), {!CyclePriceInput}, IF( AND( OR( ISPICKVAL({!Get_Opportunity.Type},'New Sale'), ISPICKVAL({!Get_Opportunity.Type},'Upsell'), ISPICKVAL({!Get_Opportunity.Type},'Renewal') ), {!CurrencyInput} != 'USD' ), ROUND({!Get_Exchange_Rate.USD_Exchange_Rate__c} * {!CyclePriceInput}, 0), {!Get_Opportunity.Cycle_Price__c} )))

formulas.name: DiscountReasonResult
formulas.expression: IF( CONTAINS({!DiscountReasonInput}, '; --None--'), SUBSTITUTE({!DiscountReasonInput}, '; --None--', ""), IF( CONTAINS({!DiscountReasonInput}, '; --None--;'), SUBSTITUTE({!DiscountReasonInput}, '; --None--;', ""), IF( CONTAINS({!DiscountReasonInput}, '--None--;'), SUBSTITUTE({!DiscountReasonInput}, '--None--;', ""), {!DiscountReasonInput} )))

formulas.description: Formula to make sure the CB field is changed every time the User enters and finishes the Flow. Meaning due to the VR the User will always need to Close Won using the Flow. Even if the Opp was reverted back to Open.
formulas.name: For_Toggle
SecondaryUseCaseResult
formulas.expression: IF( {!SecondaryUseCaseInput} = '--None--', null, IF( CONTAINS({!SecondaryUseCaseInput}, '; --None--'), SUBSTITUTE({!SecondaryUseCaseInput}, '; --None--', ""), IF( CONTAINS({!SecondaryUseCaseInput}, '; --None--;'), SUBSTITUTE({!SecondaryUseCaseInput}, '; --None--;', ""), IF( CONTAINS({!SecondaryUseCaseInput}, '--None--;'), SUBSTITUTE({!SecondaryUseCaseInput}, '--None--;', ""), {!SecondaryUseCaseInput} ))))

formulas.name: SolutionFitResult
formulas.expression: IF( {!SolutionFitInput} = "" || ISNULL({!SolutionFitInput}) || ISBLANK({!SolutionFitInput}), {!SolutionFitVar}, IF( CONTAINS({!SolutionFitInput}, '; --None--'), SUBSTITUTE({!SolutionFitInput}, '; --None--', ""), IF( CONTAINS({!SolutionFitInput}, '; --None--;'), SUBSTITUTE({!SolutionFitInput}, '; --None--;', ""), IF( CONTAINS({!SolutionFitInput}, '--None--;'), SUBSTITUTE({!SolutionFitInput}, '--None--;', ""), {!SolutionFitInput} ))))

Flow.label: Opportunity Closed Won

recordLookups.name: Acquired_Get_Product_Tracking_From_Opportunity
recordLookups.label: Acquired - Get Product Tracking From Opportunity

recordLookups.description: Get the CSA Request Record Type
recordLookups.name: Get_CSA_Request_RT
recordLookups.label: Get CSA Request RT

recordLookups.description: Get the CSS Request Record Type
recordLookups.name: Get_CSS_Request_RT
recordLookups.label: Get CSS Request RT

recordLookups.description: Check if there are SE/CSA Related Request records under the Opportunity that started the Flow.
recordLookups.name: Get_Related_Request
recordLookups.label: Get Related Request

recordLookups.description: Get the Record Type of SE Request
recordLookups.name: Get_SE_Request_RT
recordLookups.label: Get SE Request RT

recordUpdates.name: Update_STRAT_Account_New_Sales_SM
recordUpdates.label: Update STRAT Account New Sales SM

fields.name: MissingSWIndustry
fields.fieldText: SW Industry on the Account must be populated in order to close the Opportunity. Please go to the Account record and populate it

fields.name: MissingCountry
fields.fieldText: Country on the Account must be populated in order to close the Opportunity. Please go to the Account record and populate it

fields.name: MissingState
fields.fieldText: State on the Account must be populated if Country is United States or Canada. Please go to the Account record and populate it

fields.name: Acquired_Company_Tracking_Validation_Message
fields.fieldText: You must select at least 1 Product to continue

fields.name: ClosedWonAcquiredHeader
fields.fieldText:
Opportunity Details

Account Name: {!Get_Account.Name} Industry: {!Get_Account.SW_Industry__c} Opp Type: {!Get_Opportunity.Type} Cycle: {!Get_Opportunity.Cycle__c}

fields.name: ClosedWonPartnershipHeader
fields.fieldText:
Opportunity Details

Account Name: {!Get_Account.Name} Industry: {!Get_Account.SW_Industry__c} Opp Type: {!Get_Opportunity.Type} Cycle: {!Get_Opportunity.Cycle__c}

validationRule.errorMessage: Can't enter a past date

fields.name: PlanDetailsPartnershipInput
fields.fieldText: Plan Details: Agreement territory, sales referral or lifecycle referral, partner access - yes/no/ if yes - which access

validationRule.errorMessage: Your input is too long. The maximum number of characters is 255

fields.name: CompetitorProductDefaultsPartnership
fields.fieldText: Competitor Product:{!CompetitorProductVar}

fields.name: CompetitorProductPartnershipInput
fields.helpText: If you want to change values, please uncheck the default one first

validationRule.errorMessage: Your input is too long. The maximum number of characters is 100

fields.name: OpportunityDetailsMainHeader
fields.fieldText:
Opportunity Details

Account Name: {!Get_Account.Name} Industry: {!Get_Account.SW_Industry__c} Opp Type: {!Get_Opportunity.Type} Cycle: {!Get_Opportunity.Cycle__c} Orig. Renewal Date: {!Get_Opportunity.Original_Renewal_Date__c}

validationRule.errorMessage: Cycle Price must be greater than 0.

fields.name: WarningHeader
fields.fieldText: When marking the opportunity as closed won, please ensure the following:

fields.name: WarningCheckbox2
fields.fieldText: For contract clients - signed document/email confirmation was attached

fields.name: WarningCheckbox3
fields.fieldText: For CC/Wire Transfer clients - payment was successfully received

validationRule.errorMessage: All the checkboxes in this section must be checked

fields.name: SolutionFitInput
fields.fieldText: Which departments did we interact with?
fields.helpText: If you want to change values, please uncheck the default one first

fields.name: Is_the_DDQ_is_still_needed_after_the_opp_stage_is_marked_as_closed_won
fields.fieldText: Is the DDQ is still needed after the opp stage is marked as closed won?

fields.name: Additional_comment
fields.helpText: If the DDQ is no longer required enter none on the Additional comments

validationRule.errorMessage: Your input is too long. The maximum number of characters is 255

fields.name: CompetitorProductInput
fields.helpText: If you want to change values, please uncheck the default one first

validationRule.errorMessage: Your input is too long. The maximum number of characters is 100

fields.name: DownsellReasonsInput
fields.helpText: Please select up to 2 of the following reasons

fields.name: PricingRationaleInput
fields.helpText: Please explain the logic behind X% discount on previous ARR

fields.name: DiscountReasonDefaults
fields.fieldText: Discount Reason: {!DiscountReasonVar}

fields.name: DiscountReasonInput
fields.helpText: If you want to change values, please uncheck the default one first

fields.name: MissingDataOrFeatureInput
fields.fieldText: Missing Data or Feature from Platform:

fields.name: MissingCoverageOrFeatureInput
fields.fieldText: Please specify missing coverage or feature

fields.name: SectionInPROwAccuracyIssuesInput
fields.fieldText: Please specify section in PRO with data accuracy issues

fields.name: CountryThatHadIssuesInput
fields.fieldText: Please specify the country that had issues

fields.name: SecondaryUseCaseInput
fields.helpText: If you want to change values, please uncheck the default one first

fields.name: Services_Start_Date
fields.helpText:
The contract start date;

Can be customer signature date or a specific start date outlined in the signed contract

fields.name: GeneralErrorMessage
fields.fieldText:
The process run into an error. Please try again or contact SalesOps.
Error: {!$Flow.FaultMessage}

fields.name: Tracking_Validation_Message
fields.fieldText: You must select at least 1 Product to continue

fields.name: Renewal_Cycle_Price_ValidationError
fields.fieldText: The cycle price cannot be higher than the original renewal amount. Please create an upsell opportunity to reflect an increase in ARR

fields.name: Renewal_Cycle_Price_ValidationError_0
fields.fieldText: This Account was flagged by Legal and can not be worked further on. Please don’t proceed with the deal / quote until Legal team will clear this Account. You will get an email with the updated status

fields.name: Validate_Closed_OppsError
fields.fieldText: You cannot update a closed opportunity. Please contact Sales Ops for assistance.

fields.name: ErrorsHeader
fields.fieldText: Please press the 'Previous' button and fix the below errors:

fields.name: OtherCompetitorsMissing
fields.fieldText: You have selected the 'Other' Competitor Product, therefore you must enter 'Other Competitors' details

fields.name: OtherCompetitorsErrorText
fields.fieldText: 'Other Competitors' are allowed only if 'Other' is selected in the 'Competitor Product' picklist

fields.name: CompetitorProductMissing
fields.fieldText: You have selected a competitor, therefore you must select a 'Competitor Product' or set 'Using a competitor' to 'Unknown'

fields.name: MissingDataOrFeatureNone
fields.fieldText: Please select 'Missing Data of Feature from Platform' value

fields.name: IssuesWithDataWeShowNone
fields.fieldText: Please select 'Issues with Data We Show' value

fields.name: ClosedWonReasonEQUALSClosedWonReason2
fields.fieldText: 'Closed Won Reason' and 'Closed Won Reason #2' can't be the same

fields.name: PrimaryUseCaseEqualsSecondary
fields.fieldText: 'Primary Use Case' and 'Secondary Use Case' can't be the same

variables.description: Output from the product tracking subflow
variables.name: New_Product_Created

variables.description: from priduct tracking flow output in main screen
variables.name: outputBool1

variables.description: When we found SE/CSA related Requests on the Opp that started the Flow we check this Variable.
variables.name: Var_Found_Related_Requests
